name: honam-is-hackathon
description: Personal feasibility MVP workspace for a Honam/Gwangju official-source RAG demo.

scripts.backend:hint: echo "Backend hint: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -e . && uvicorn app.main:app --reload"
scripts.backend:test:hint: echo "Backend test hint: cd backend && python -m pytest"
